bank.retain_mission: Extract support-operations decisions, response playbooks, escalation paths, infrastructure-maintenance outcomes, compliance checks, executive-summary findings, and analytics observations.
bank.observations_mission: Observations are stable facts about the support stack, SLAs, escalation paths, recurring issue categories, and compliance obligations. Ignore one-off ticket details.

mental_models.name: Support Operations
mental_models.source_query: How does support operate? Channels, SLAs, escalation paths, and the tools/playbooks the team relies on.

mental_models.name: Issue Trends
mental_models.source_query: What issue categories recur, what's their volume and resolution time, and which response patterns work best? Include compliance and infra-maintenance themes.
